Component ResourceManager.description: As a developer working on Apache YARN, your task is to understand the design decisions behind the ResourceManager component. You want to study how the ResourceManager coordinates cluster-wide scheduling and allocation and understand the underlying architectural structure, tradeoffs, and implementation choices.

question1.description: What are the components and connectors of ResourceManager, and what rationale is given for those architectural choices?

question2.description: Which quality attributes are considered in the design of ResourceManager?

question3.description: What architectural tactics or patterns are used in ResourceManager to satisfy those quality attributes?

question4.description: Which technologies, libraries, or mechanisms are used in ResourceManager, and what rationale is given for selecting them?

Requirement Resource Isolation and Secur.description: resource isolation and secure multi-tenant execution are central requirements in Apache YARN. Your task is to explore the architectural decisions that Apache YARN uses to address Resource Isolation and Security.

question1.description: What are the architectural components and connectors in Apache YARN that are responsible for Resource Isolation and Security?

question2.description: What architectural tactics or patterns are used in Apache YARN to implement Resource Isolation and Security?

question3.description: Which technologies, libraries, or mechanisms are integrated into Apache YARN to achieve Resource Isolation and Security?
